sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43097" key="e(/taros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἕταρος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτάρη</orth>, <sense id="n43097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἑταῖρος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0020.tlg002.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0020.tlg002.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔτας</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔτης.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
